violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. A bag of flour was stored on a towel and next to the hand sink.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Containers of taco meat, potatoes, and other food items in the white fridge in the kitchen were not dated.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The shelves in the back storage room used for food storage were bare wood. Needs to be a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The cold plate for the soda system in the East ice bin in the bar needs to be cleaned.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. A clean roaster pan was drying next to the hand sink.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of foam food containers and plastic cups were stored on the floor in the side storage room.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Soap was not available at the hand sink.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided 0/3, C TOILET FACILITIES 38 Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
